column1: # Dash partition table for ESP32-WROOM 16MB flash.
# Layout chosen to be compatible with the Arduino-ESP32 prebuilt bootloader
# which requires app0 at offset 0x10000. nvs_keys / encryption is deferred to
# M8 (see wiki/decisions.md ADR-005) — adding it here without a matching
# custom bootloader build traps the chip in a silent boot loop.
# region at the tail of flash for post-mortem diagnostics.
